context: A small autonomous robot explores a quiet park path under clear daylight.

actions.description: The silver robot rolls into view on the gravel path with its front camera aimed ahead.
It moves steadily past flowers and trees, wheels crunching softly while the camera scans.
The robot continues along the curve, catching warm highlights on its rounded body.
